characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Alliterative Family:Tucker,Trudy,Tuesday andTruman. Badass Family: Being a family of spies, this was a given. Dysfunctional Family: Even when being a spy doesn't factor into things, their lives and interactions with each other are very chaotic.Parodied in "Family Issues" when they try to emulate the problems they think normal families have, only to wind upLost in Character. Parodied in "Family Issues" when they try to emulate the problems they think normal families have, only to wind upLost in Character. Gender-Equal Ensemble: Two males, two females.

characters.name: As a group
characters.description: Alliterative Family:Tucker,Trudy,Tuesday andTruman. Badass Family: Being a family of spies, this was a given. Dysfunctional Family: Even when being a spy doesn't factor into things, their lives and interactions with each other are very chaotic.Parodied in "Family Issues" when they try to emulate the problems they think normal families have, only to wind upLost in Character. Parodied in "Family Issues" when they try to emulate the problems they think normal families have, only to wind upLost in Character. Gender-Equal Ensemble: Two males, two females.

characters.name: Mr. X
characters.description: Action Dad: Leader of his family, and a skilled hand-to-hand fighter. Baritone of Strength: Is strong enough to tear a man apart with his bare hands alone, and has a deep voice to match. Bumbling Dad: He's 100% behind his kids, he's also just as clueless. By-the-Book Cop: "Not in the manual, not gonna happen." Catchphrase: "To the X-Jet!"

characters.name: Mrs. X
characters.description: Action Mom: Home Base literally describes her as "Combat specialist, and mother". Blood Knight: She practically lives for fighting and battling. Casting Gag: This isn't the first timeWendie Malickvoicesa motherora spy. Fiery Redhead: Has red hair, and a very volatile personality. Green-Eyed Redhead: Has red hair and dark green eyes.

characters.name: Tuesday X
characters.description: Action Girl: Takes after her mom in fighting skills. Affectionate Gesture to the Head: Truman gave her a noogie during their fight in "Doomates". Big Sister Bully: Often picks on Truman just as much as vice versa. "Truman X: Super Villain" even has him watch three consecutive clips of her giving him atomic wedgies. Boyish Short Hair: She has spiky neck-length hair in a punk-rock style. Dating Catwoman: Her boyfriend, Brandon, is Glowface's nephew.

characters.name: Truman X
characters.description: Annoying Younger Sibling: To his big sister Tuesday. Bratty Half-Pint: Prides himself on being a little troublemaker. Child Prodigy: Is highly intelligent for his age and a technology whiz. Evil Costume Switch: Dresses like Glowface when he becomes "Trumanface". Evil Laugh: Although not a villain, he sometimes does this.

characters.name: Rex X
characters.description: Rhyming Names: Rex X. Lampshaded by Mr. X in "Boy's Best Fiend". Satellite Character: Being Truman's dog, he doesn't have much of a character of his own. Second Episode Introduction: Makes his debut in the second episode produced (though not the second to be aired).

characters.name: Home Base
characters.description: Servile Snarker: Gives many dry quips to the family while he keeps himself in order. Smart House: He controls the house that the X's live in. Becomes a bit of a problem in "Three Days Of The Coin Op" when he has to go offline due to Truman messing with him, and "Missing Home" when he kicks the family out after they repeatedly act like jerks to him and forget his birthday. Temporarily a Villain: Helps Tuesday try to get Truman in trouble in "To Err Is Truman".

characters.name: Glowface
characters.description: Abnormal Allergy: He mentions being allergic to zucchini in "Pinheads". Affably Evil: He can be rather friendly at times, and he seems to care about his butler. Amazing Technicolor Population: Has red skin. Bald of Evil: Lampshaded in "Y's Up":Glowface:(excited over the Y's showing up)Lorenzo, how's my hair?Lorenzo: You have none, sir.Glowface: Then fetch me some! Big Bad: S.N.A.F.U.'s leader.

characters.name: Lorenzo Suave
characters.description: Battle Butler: When he actually does get to fight in the field, Lorenzo proves himself much more dangerous than Glowface.Tuesday: Whoa. Heisgood. Casting Gag:Not the first timeTom Kanevoices a sophisticated character with aHigh-Class Glassand an English accent.Or a villain,for that matter. Or a villain,for that matter. The Dragon: Is Glowface's second-in-commmand. Evil Brit: Has a notable British accent.

characters.name: Sasquatch
characters.description: Bigfoot, Sasquatch, and Yeti: Explicitly called Sasquatch. Casting Gag: At the end of "The Haunting of Home Base", Sasquatch offers beef jerky to the X's, a possible nod to Wrestling/Randy Savage being the spokesman for Slim Jim. Catchphrase: "Sasquatch is the mightiest of all!" Compelling Voice: Sasquatch the ability to control animals with a hypnotic roar. Evil Is Bigger: Is the largest member of S.N.A.F.U. and thus bigger than the X's.

characters.name: Scream Queens
characters.description: Amazing Technicolor Population: One's gray and the other's blue. Brought to You by the Letter "S": Each of them has a letter on her dress: "S" and "Q". Evil Redhead: One of them is this while the other's blonde. No Name Given: Their given names are never revealed. Red Eyes, Take Warning: They both have red eyes.

characters.name: McVampires
characters.description: Amazing Technicolor Population: They all have pale blue skin. Evil Redhead: All of them. Gender-Equal Ensemble: Just like the X's. No Name Given: Their first names are never mentioned. Technicolor Eyes: Yellow irises on black sclerae, just like Sasquatch.

characters.name: Bio-Harold
characters.description: The Faceless: His face is hidden by his hazmat suit, excepting his eyes. Punny Name: On "biohazard". Red Eyes, Take Warning: The only part of his face that's shown.

characters.name: Missing Link
characters.description: Meaningful Name: He appears to be an ape/man hybrid. Scary Teeth: As befitting his primitive nature, he has crooked, rotten teeth like Glowface.

characters.name: Brandon
characters.description: Dating Catwoman: Tuesday X is his girlfriend. Nice Guy: He's a good-natured boy who likes Tuesday and her family. Punch-Clock Villain: He doesn't really like working as a S.N.A.F.U. intern, but he needs a job to earn school credits and money for guitar lessons. Token Good Teammate: He isn't evil like the other members of S.N.A.F.U.

characters.name: Wally's family
characters.description: All There in the Manual: Only the credits reveal their names. They are credited as Wally, "Mrs. Wally" and Wally Jr. Baby's First Words: After the X's babysit Junior in "Live and Let Diaper", he appears to be ready to say his first words, only to do anEvil Laughas a result of bonding with Glowface during the X's mission, to the X's embarrassment and the confusion of Junior's parents. Chubby Mama, Skinny Papa: Wally is slim while his wife is overweight.

characters.name: Kimla Meeks
characters.description: Nerd Glasses: Always wears these. Nerdy Nasalness: Has a congested-sounding voice. Running Gag: Her intergalactic chanting. Shout-Out: Fitting for her sci-fi obsession, she wears her hair likePrincess LeiainA New Hope.

characters.name: Andrea
characters.description: Girlish Pigtails: Wears her hear like this. Loving Bully: She beats Truman up, but is fond of him nonetheless.

characters.name: The Y's
characters.description: Alliterative Family: Mr. and Mrs. Y's daughters are namedSeven andScout. The Rival: Are this to the X's. Single Sex Offspring: Mr. and Mrs. Y have two daughters.
